messages.author: Kudus
messages.body: Happy Birthday! I hope today brings you as much joy as you bring to people around you. And may your new age be a ladder to greatness....

messages.author: Nadia
messages.body:
I want to thank you for the kind of friendship that doesn’t need daily presence to stay real. From the start, you made space for me without questions, without judgment, without keeping score. You didn’t just listen, you understood, and in doing so you made me feel like a sister instead of just a friend.

Life pulled us onto different paths and we don’t see each other the way we used to. But the phone calls haven’t changed. You still answer with the same warmth, the same patience, the same way of making me feel heard even when my words are messy and my thoughts are scattered. That’s rare, and I don’t take it for granted.

Distance can dull a lot of things, but it hasn’t touched what we have. You’ve been my steady place, my reminder that I’m not alone, and that some bonds hold simply because they’re built on care, not convenience.

I’m grateful for you. For the laughter we’ve shared, for the silence you’ve sat through with me, and for still showing up for me even now. You’re family in every way that matters.

messages.author: ....Edwin, A.K.A. Bulldog
messages.body: Hertyyyy! Happy birthday! I’m so glad I met you...you’re truly one of a kind. May you continue to age like fine wine. God bless you!

messages.author: ....Damien
messages.body:
Happy birthday to someone that i will never forget,

No matter where life takes us, a part of me will always quietly root for your happiness.

So here's to you,

May this year bring you all that your heart seeks and more.

Hope my prayers can hug you, when my arms can't.

messages.author: Tabi
messages.body: Happy Womb Escape, prettiest boss🙂‍↕️. Thanks for being a great boss and friend and mentoring me in times of need. Stop being evil too and welcome to the 20s.

messages.author: Samuella Afiyo
messages.body:
Happy 20th birthday!

It’s crazy how long we’ve known each other 10+ years of school, exams, sleepovers, and all the little memories in between. Even though life took us different ways for a bit, I’m really grateful our friendship has stayed.

Wishing you all the best as you step into your 20s. I’m proud of you and glad to call you my friend 🤍

messages.author: ....Augustus, A.K.A. Sir Beauty
messages.body: Henrietta, the way you show up for people without making it loud is something I really admire. You make ordinary moments feel steady and kind, and I’m grateful you’re in my life. I hope today reminds you how much you’re valued, even in the small things you don’t notice about yourself.

messages.author: Pius
messages.body: Henrietta, you’re honestly one of the most genuine people I know. Your presence alone brings calm and happiness and it’s something I don’t take for granted. I appreciate you more than I probably say and I’m really glad to have you in my life. Keep being you, it’s more than enough.🙂

messages.author: Mercy
messages.body: It’s been a whole journey and I’m so glad we’re in this together 🤭. I know you’ll probably read this and think I’m just talking or that I only said it because I had to, and you'll definitely tease me later saying ”I know you love me”🤭. But honestly, I really do care for you and I appreciate everything about us. I love how we're growing together and I'm praying for your success in everything. Love you for reeeaaallllllll Herty. ❤️

letterParagraphs: To my boss, math tutor, late travel buddy and dunno-what-else-to-call-you partner
Building this digital space for you felt like excavating a mountain of gold. Every photo, every memory I embedded is a testament to the person you are—steadfast, brilliant, and absolutely unique.
This vault is yours (and mine). It's a reminder that even when the work is hard and the engineering problems feel impossible, you have a foundation of love that's deeper than any mine on earth.
I'm proud of you. Keep pushing

letters.title: A Note from the developer himself
letters.subtitle: Confidential / Heartfelt
paragraphs: To my boss, math tutor, late travel buddy and dunno-what-else-to-call-you partner
Building this digital space for you felt like excavating a mountain of gold. Every photo, every memory I embedded is a testament to the person you are - steadfast, brilliant, and absolutely unique.
This vault is yours (and probably mine). It's a reminder that even when the work is hard and problems feel impossible, you have a foundation of love that's deeper than any mine on earth.
I'm proud of you. Keep pushing

letters.title: Dunno what title to give this
letters.subtitle: Not Confidential...lol
paragraphs: Ermm... I'm drunk on water while typing this... its 3:38am on 8th May 2026

I always tell people I hate web development, but of course, I know how to do it. This is the first time I have consistently sat down to work on a web project without the thought of giving up on it crossing my mind.

I don't know why though. But I do enjoy the process and its also probably the most sophisticated website I have built. So many features (you probably wouldn't understand what I mean or maybe you would?!). But... it's cool. I love that you are tech inclined and make the effort to learn more. It's inspiring.
As evil as you may be, I hope you love the website?!!

letters.title: Lemme answer some questions you've asked me before.
letters.subtitle: Why I didn't sleep on the bus?
paragraphs: Still light headed while typing this... its 4:00am now... still 8th May.
I was not the one who said he can't sleep on busses(why does the spelling look weird). I normally sleep at least an hour after the bus has moved and prefer to sleep throughout the journey.

Then again, I am a protective person, involuntarily/ unconciously, it's something I can't control. I just had to stay awake to make sure you're safe throughout. Maybe my fatherhood or husband instints are kicked in early. Maybe it comes with being 20... you can't relate... oh... you just hit 20. 🤣
Or maybe I was just worried about my laptop? 😂!!

letters.title: Like I said, this vault is for you and I
letters.subtitle: Between you and I
paragraphs: Started getting headache atp, you're the drinker here, does that mean I'm sobbering up?
In as much as I am not your boyfriend, I... naa... knowing you, you'd use this against me... I'd skip this paragraph
I don't really like it when... again, I am not ur bf or brother or anything so... I cleaned what I typed... (nothing much really) 🤐
Skipped a lot of words because I know you and how all this would play out... 🙂‍↕️😏

letters.title: Putting this issue to rest
letters.subtitle: TITI is nothing to me, like you think.
paragraphs: I know you probably keep relating it to the time you saw her and I alone in the room,... whilst you were with Damien

So the thing is, she got aangry when we were discussing smthng and instead of Damien to defend her, because he's known her longer, he didn't and defended you. So she saw you getting physical with Damien (we all saw), and she also vex and decided to reciprocate.

I, of course, was the gentleman of choice for her mission. She came over because of Damien and I and Damien had already betrayed her so I had to step-in for brotherman so she doesn't feel stupid for that. Obviously I caught you throwing constant glares at us... it all happened when I was also being weird and we(you and I) were both not in good terms so I'm sure it played out in ur tiny head in a wrong way. (in as much as you'd deny it)

Sorry for all that though, if I had interest in a gf in uni,... you'd probably be the first on the list.😂 (I mean... I've crossed some weird lines already🫣).... (My head: She's already rehearsed a 'bounce' line for me already 🤣)

timeline.title: 2nd Grade
timeline.body: The first encounter. First time we met, probably didn't even think we'd still know each other till now.

timeline.title: Senior Year
timeline.body: We both wrote BECE in JHS 2, just, what if, either of us waited for JHS3, we might have been out of touch, with neither of us enjoying the company we give to each other now.

Started with text online about us going to the same university. We later see each other after so long at Melcom (that day I was having a waist problem and almost laid on the floor to cry when you touched me).
